title: Generation-1 evolution audit
description: Implement claude.md §5A steps 1-2: parse .harness/logs/transcript.jsonl and events.jsonl; build a failure taxonomy (tool errors, lock contention, expired leases, cascade-gate refusals, retry storms); audit decision gaps (expected vs actual outcomes recorded in task notes); write .harness/logs/audit_gen1.md with top-3 falsifiable mutation proposals, each citing concrete log lines; register proposals in state.json evolution.pending_proposals for the coordinator.
acceptance_criteria: audit cites specific log line evidence for every claim
each proposal states the expected measurable improvement
no direct edits to claude.md/gemini.md (that is T-007, gated)

notes.note: AUDIT INPUT (T-002 verification, 2026-07-04): frictions fact-checked by harness-verifier — F1 PARTIALLY VALID: proposed lock.py list/status ALREADY EXISTS (lock.py:98-117); real signal = CLI discoverability gap for cross-engine agents, not a missing feature. F2 VALID: gemini.md §2A mandatory Planning block duplicates Antigravity-native plan artifacts. F3 VALID: no recontext.py CLI; recontext_evidence.md requires no lock per gemini.md §4B and gemini-runner acquired 0 locks on it — collision gap. Extra anomalies: (i) lock.py status/sweep reject --agent, mismatch with the pass-identity-everywhere rule; (ii) cross-engine timestamp inconsistency in recontext headers (local -06:00 vs UTC Z). Evidence: .harness/logs/gemini_contract_report.md + T-002 verdict note.
